item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":true,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.82,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"嘉宾到场错门，邀请函加入口图"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"签到漏姓名，表格旁补填写样例"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"茶歇排队混乱，动线牌挂分流句"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天停车被问，请在短信里塞停车提醒"}],"abstain_reason":""}
